description: Version-controlled retrieval fixtures for the AgentRail Context Compiler. Each fixture maps a representative task/query to the source files that MUST appear in retrieval results. Used by evaluate_retrieval to compute precision_at_budget and required-source coverage per fixture. Keep queries keyword-focused for BM25 compatibility (no external model calls required).

fixtures.name: pack-quality-compute
fixtures.task: compute_pack_quality selected excluded precision budget token estimate required

fixtures.name: retrieval-evaluation
fixtures.task: evaluate_retrieval load_fixtures precision_at_budget coverage required source inclusion

fixtures.name: context-pack-build
fixtures.task: build_context_pack write_json packs_dir pack_id sections included excluded

fixtures.name: context-index-build
fixtures.task: build_index source_record_for_file extracted_symbols chunks records walk_files

fixtures.name: query-context-bm25-retrieval
fixtures.task: query_context BM25 bm25 hybrid retrieval results limit score candidates

fixtures.name: context-index-build-hard
fixtures._comment: NON-SATURATED (recall@5<1.0) fixture for #1088 AC3. index.py imports source_record_for_file from sources.py (index.py:13), so sources.py is a GENUINE dependency of build_index. The task names build_index/walk_files (surfacing index.py@1 and fs.py@3 -- both required and retrievable) but does NOT name the source-record helper, so the symbol-literal retriever leaves sources.py deep (~rank 17, outside the pack): a real cross-file recall miss of the kind #1043's recall layer targets. This gives the recall metric genuine headroom to move. Do not add sources.py to requiredSources.
fixtures.task: build_index walk_files extracted_symbols chunks records over the repository tree

fixtures.name: context-pack-build-hard
fixtures._comment: NON-SATURATED (recall@5<1.0) fixture for #1088 AC3. build_context_pack (packs.py) genuinely imports compute_pack_quality from pack_quality.py (packs.py:16), but a task phrased around pack assembly does not name that symbol, so the symbol-literal retriever misses pack_quality.py entirely (a real recall weakness #1043 targets). packs.py stays retrievable (required). Do not add pack_quality.py to requiredSources.
fixtures.task: build_context_pack assemble sections included excluded budget candidates write pack

fixtures.name: query-context-rerank-rank-hard
fixtures._comment: RANK-NON-SATURATED (baseline fileNDCG<1.0) fixture for #1107, the rank analog of the #1088 recall traps above. retrieval.py imports rerank_candidates/rerank_enabled from rerank.py (retrieval.py:19), so rerank.py is a GENUINE dependency of query_context's ranking stage. The task names query_context/retrieval (surfacing retrieval.py at distinct-file rank 1 -- required and retrievable) plus rerank concepts, so rerank.py IS retrieved, but the deterministic_code_aware_v1 order buries it at distinct-file rank 3, BELOW the unrelated noise file scripts/benchmark-vs-grep.py at rank 2 -> baseline fileNDCG=0.919721 (<1.0). A good reorder (the #1044 LLM listwise rerank) can promote rerank.py above the noise and move the number, so the rerank's lift is finally measurable. Deliberately rank-non-saturated; do NOT add rerank.py to requiredSources -- it must stay a non-required expected file the ranker misplaces (a rank miss, not a hard failure).
fixtures.task: query_context hybrid retrieval BM25 candidates score rerank reorder listwise

fixtures.name: context-pack-build-rank-hard
fixtures._comment: RANK-NON-SATURATED (baseline fileNDCG<1.0) fixture for #1107. build_context_pack (packs.py) imports build_memory_lane/frame_untrusted_memory from memory_lane.py (packs.py:15), so memory_lane.py is a GENUINE dependency of pack assembly. The task names build_context_pack (surfacing packs.py at distinct-file rank 1 -- required and retrievable) and memory-lane assembly, so memory_lane.py IS retrieved, but the deterministic order buries it at distinct-file rank 4, BELOW higher-BM25 files (shared/json.py at rank 2, retrieval.py at rank 3) that fall outside the labeled relevant set for this task -> baseline fileNDCG=0.877215 (<1.0). A reranker keyed on the task's 'memory lane frame untrusted' terms can promote memory_lane.py and lift nDCG. Deliberately rank-non-saturated; do NOT add memory_lane.py to requiredSources.
fixtures.task: build_context_pack write_json packs_dir pack_id sections included excluded memory lane frame untrusted
